name: Kuaidi100 - Express Tracking API
description: China's largest logistics tracking platform with 300M+ daily queries. Track packages from 1,000+ Chinese couriers and 200+ countries. Essential for e-commerce order tracking.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Kuaidi100 (快递100) is China's #1 logistics tracking platform processing over 300 million queries daily. Track packages from 1,000+ Chinese couriers (SF Express, YTO, ZTO, STO, etc.) and 200+ international carriers. Real-time status updates for e-commerce, logistics management, and order tracking. **Note:** Requires API key from [Kuaidi100 Developer Platform](https://api.kuaidi100.com/).

tools.name: Real-time Package Tracking
tools.description: Track package in real-time by tracking number and courier code

sign.description: MD5 signature: MD5(param + key + customer). Generated from tracking parameters

param.description: JSON string with tracking info: {com:'courier_code', num:'tracking_number', phone:'last_4_digits', from:'sender_city', to:'receiver_city', resultv2:'1'}

tools.name: Auto-detect Courier
tools.description: Automatically detect courier company from tracking number

tools.name: Get Supported Couriers
tools.description: Get list of all supported courier companies and their codes
